results.explanation: New rule says tap above 1620°C minimum, candidate says never tap above 1610°C. Same conditions, incompatible thresholds.
results.shared_conditions: Tap temperature on carbon steel grades, EAF process.

results.explanation: New statement says late Al addition raises tap temp 8-12°C, candidate says it lowers temp 5-10°C. Same conditions, opposite effects.
results.shared_conditions: Late aluminium addition effects on tap temperature with low-Si aim chemistry in EAF operations.

results.explanation: New rule says inject carbon during flat bath when FeO > 28%, candidate says stop all carbon injection once flat bath is established.
results.shared_conditions: Carbon injection timing during flat bath phase, EAF process area, all heats.

results.explanation: New rule says increase casting speed when oscillation exceeds 5mm, candidate says reduce speed. Same trigger condition, opposite actions.
results.shared_conditions: Slab caster on peritectic grades when mould level oscillation exceeds 5 mm.

results.explanation: New rule allows tapping at 0.020% P max, candidate forbids tapping above 0.015% P. Same grades, same conditions, conflicting thresholds.
results.shared_conditions: S355 and A572 structural grades on EAF route.

results.explanation: New rule says add FeMn before FeSi, candidate says add FeSi before FeMn. Same deoxidation sequence, opposite order.
results.shared_conditions: Deoxidation sequence for heats requiring both silicon and manganese alloying in EAF process.

results.explanation: New rule says charge light scrap on top, candidate says charge heavy scrap on top. Same bucket, opposite charging order.
results.shared_conditions: Two-bucket charging, first bucket scrap arrangement, EAF process area.

results.explanation: New rule says continue casting at 5% rise, candidate says intervene at 5% rise. Same trigger, opposite actions.
results.shared_conditions: SEN drive current 5% above baseline, all casts, drive current as clogging proxy.

results.explanation: New rule says reheat to 1180-1210°C, candidate says 1230-1260°C. Same operation, overlapping scope, incompatible temperature ranges.
results.shared_conditions: Reheat temperature before roughing stand entry for structural grades.

results.explanation: New rule accepts cut-open pressure vessels, candidate rejects all pressure vessels with zero tolerance.
results.shared_conditions: All incoming scrap deliveries containing pressure vessels or sealed containers.

results.explanation: Both are scrap delivery rules but address different aspects - certificate verification vs physical inspection.
New statement specifies the general 'bad scrap' rule with exact threshold (50% Sims) and speed reduction (15%).
results.shared_conditions: Slab casting when scrap quality is poor, targeting reduction of surface crack formation.

results.explanation: New rule covers fresh lining (105 min total), candidate covers established lining (90 min). Different conditions, both valid.
Both about argon stirring but for different purposes - candidate for sampling prep, new rule for Ca injection prep.
New rule is about roll surface inspection; candidate is about sample preparation for chemistry analysis.
Different speed ranges: candidate covers 1.2-1.6 m/min, new statement covers above 1.6 m/min. Both optimize negative strip time.
New statement addresses EAF electrode consumption, candidate addresses hot strip mill coiler tension - different equipment and process areas.
New rule about soft-bubble rinse timing and existing rule about stirring gas choice address different aspects of ladle treatment.
New statement specifies the exact friction threshold (15 kN) for the general 'abnormal friction' rule in the candidate.
results.shared_conditions: All grades during casting operations when mould friction monitoring is active.

results.explanation: Near-duplicate of R-EAF-028: identical temperature range, scope, and core rationale for reheat temperature control.
